name: Shoppable Lookbook
desc: Editorial-meets-commerce experience that weaves products into seasonal storytelling. Drives collection sell-through and dwell time.

name: Gift Concierge
desc: Guided gifting flow built for Q4 holiday peaks. Recipient profiling, gift wrap, and scheduled delivery.

name: Fit Finder
desc: Product recommendation tool addressing fit and sizing confusion. Reduces return rates in apparel and footwear categories.

name: Editorial PDP
desc: PDP treatment that surfaces brand and product story alongside conversion-critical content. Used for premium and craft-led brands.

name: Search + Navigation Redesign
desc: Reworked nav structure and predictive search optimized for mobile-first shopping behavior.

name: Editorial Landing Pages
desc: Flexible landing page system marketers can deploy without engineering. Built for seasonal drops and brand storytelling.

name: Product Comparison Tool
desc: Side-by-side comparison module for product categories where customers struggle to differentiate. Reduces decision friction on PDP and PLP.

name: Quick Add to Cart
desc: PLP and PDP enhancement that lets shoppers add to cart without navigating away. Lifts AOV through cross-sell prompts.

name: Product Discovery Quiz
desc: Guided onboarding flow that recommends products based on customer input. Effective for technical or fit-driven categories.

name: Bundle Builder
desc: Customer-configured product bundles. Drives AOV and is foundational for subscription bundle offerings.

name: Loyalty Drawer
desc: Persistent loyalty status and points UI integrated into the storefront chrome. Reinforces program awareness throughout the journey.

name: Subscription Portal
desc: Customer-facing portal for managing subscription frequency, swaps, skips, and add-ons. The retention layer of any subscription offering.

name: AI Search
desc: Natural-language product search powered by LLM-based retrieval. Surfaces products based on intent rather than keyword match.
